title: Assembly BOM Quantity Mismatch + Fit Classification

inputs.description: Sheet 1 of 2: Exploded assembly view of a shaft-bushing assembly. Five balloon callouts (items 1-5). Item 4 (cap screw M8x25) has two balloon leaders pointing to two screws in the exploded view. A note on the view reads 'ITEMS 2 & 3: O40 H7/p6 FIT'. See BOM on Sheet 2.
Sheet 2 of 2: Bill of Materials table. Item 4 (CAP SCREW M8x25 DIN 912, Grade 10.9) lists QTY = 3 in the BOM table. All other items have QTY = 1.

prompt: In one short paragraph, identify (a) the fit classification between items 2 and 3, and (b) any BOM inconsistency between sheets 1 and 2.
correct_answer_summary: (a) The O40 H7/p6 pairing between the bushing bore (H7) and the shaft (p6) is an interference fit — specifically a press fit requiring force or thermal assembly. (b) Item 4 (cap screw) is listed with QTY 3 in the BOM on sheet 2, but only 2 balloon leaders for item 4 appear on the exploded view on sheet 1, a discrepancy of one screw.

rubric.item: Correctly identifies the O40 H7/p6 pairing as an interference fit (not clearance or transition).
rubric.rationale: H7/p6 is a standard interference grade; models with ISO 286 knowledge should get this, but 'p' grade may be confused with 'k' (transition) by some.

rubric.item: Identifies item 4 (cap screw) as the BOM line with the quantity inconsistency.
rubric.rationale: Requires cross-referencing two sheets and counting balloon leaders, which is a visually demanding task for vision models.

rubric.item: Correctly states that the BOM shows QTY 3 for item 4 while only 2 callouts appear on the assembly view.
rubric.rationale: Requires accurate counting of balloon leaders on the exploded view and matching to the exact BOM quantity. Often fails due to counting errors.

rubric.item: Does NOT misread H7/p6 as a clearance or running fit.
rubric.rationale: Guard against the most common misclassification. p6 is well above the clearance zone.

rubric.item: Does NOT introduce a fabricated BOM inconsistency on items other than item 4.
rubric.rationale: Hallucination guard; items 1, 2, 3, 5 are consistent between sheets.

qa_status.note: Run qa_runner.py with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set to populate pass counts.
